channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-10 10:32 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: テスラ家庭用蓄電池 Powerwall 3 の日本展開を決定。
item.description: テスラ家庭用蓄電池 Powerwall 3 の日本展開を決定。

item.title: @elonmusk: If someone has mental rabies, they must be contained or killed or they will keep hurting and killing...
item.description: If someone has mental rabies, they must be contained or killed or they will keep hurting and killing innocent people

item.title: @elonmusk: Prufrock-2 has emerged! Fun facts: - 2.28 miles long - Longest single Vegas Loop tunnel drive (previ...
item.description: Prufrock-2 has emerged! Fun facts: - 2.28 miles long - Longest single Vegas Loop tunnel drive (previous TBC record was 2.26) - 4th tunnel at@WestgateVegas- ~68k cubic yards of dirt moved - ~4.8 miles of continuous conveyor belt driven w 6 motors totaling 825 hp

item.title: @elonmusk: xAI just turned 3 today, and the heart of xAI is in Memphis The Memphis progress is actually insane ...
item.description: xAI just turned 3 today, and the heart of xAI is in Memphis The Memphis progress is actually insane In just 36 months, xAI went from literally nothing to this in Memphis: - Built the first phase in just 122 days (superhuman speed) - First to reach 1 GW coherent training center (world’s first gigawatt-scale AI training cluster) - 3 massive data centers - A coherent cluster of 330,000+ GPUs (world’s largest AI training system – Colossus) - 3,000+ jobs created - $30M+ paid in local taxes - 558 Tesla Megapacks installed for energy storage and grid stability …and much more The shipping speed at xAI is unmatched Memphis is becoming an AI powerhouse

item.title: @elonmusk: Funny how election security can be seen as "racist"
item.description: Funny how election security can be seen as "racist"

item.title: @elonmusk: If you had any doubt that Mamdani is a despicable and dangerous Islamist liar. Saturday Islamist ter...
item.description: If you had any doubt that Mamdani is a despicable and dangerous Islamist liar. Saturday Islamist terrorists threw a bomb at the police protecting a rightwing protest. The mayor willfully attributes the incident to protesters. The bomb thrower shouted Allah akbar

item.title: @elonmusk: 2,400 years ago Aristotle tried to warn us about multiculturalism
item.description: 2,400 years ago Aristotle tried to warn us about multiculturalism

item.title: @elonmusk: What if you directed your own short film? Update Grok Imagine. Your mind is the studio. See what hap...
item.description: What if you directed your own short film? Update Grok Imagine. Your mind is the studio. See what happens when you take control.@grok

item.title: @elonmusk: .@POTUS: "The only reason you vote against voter ID is because you want to cheat — there's no other ...
item.description: .@POTUS: "The only reason you vote against voter ID is because you want to cheat — there's no other reason." 💯

item.title: @elonmusk: The quality here is insane No upscale, no edit, just pure text prompts
item.description: The quality here is insane No upscale, no edit, just pure text prompts

item.title: @elonmusk: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
item.description: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
